plato:IsReady.rdfs:label: IsReady
plato:IsReady.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a machine is ready

plato:CanPrint.rdfs:label: CanPrint
plato:CanPrint.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a printer can print using a specific material

plato:At.rdfs:label: At
plato:At.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a workpiece is located at a specific machine

plato:InFactory.rdfs:label: InFactory
plato:InFactory.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a machine is located in a specific factory

plato:IsPrinted.rdfs:label: IsPrinted
plato:IsPrinted.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a workpiece has already been printed

plato:QualityChecked.rdfs:label: QualityChecked
plato:QualityChecked.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a workpiece has undergone a quality check

plato:IsMadeOf.rdfs:label: IsMadeOf
plato:IsMadeOf.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a workpiece is made of a specific material

plato:CanTransportBetween.rdfs:label: CanTransportBetween
plato:CanTransportBetween.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a robot arm can transport a workpiece between two machines

plato:IsAvailable.rdfs:label: IsAvailable
plato:IsAvailable.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a factory is available
